impact: This gives the PP&D daemon a deterministic self-test proving a stale blocked solar extractor retry is not reselected once its size guard and malformed-comparison diagnostic have passed, allowing the next independent needed task to proceed.
summary: Add supervisor self-test fixture for parked stale solar retry
target_task: Task checkbox-84: Add a supervisor self-test fixture proving a stale blocked solar extractor retry is parked after its size guard and malformed-comparison diagnostic have both passed, so task selection can continue with the next independent `[ ]` item.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
